name: Yeddiler Mountain
description: Remote mountain area accessible only by Soviet off-road truck. Pure wilderness with no facilities.

name: Tovuz Highlands
description: High altitude means cold nights even in August. Famous for breathtaking sunsets over the mountains.

name: Canyon to Babadağ
highlight: Dramatic canyon + epic thunderstorm all night
description: Camped in a canyon on the trail to Babadağ peak. Experienced an all-night thunderstorm — terrifying and unforgettable.

name: Zirəvun Pass
description: High mountain pass on the İsmayıllı–Qəbələ road. Snow in winter accessible only by GAZ-66.

name: Hamosham Valley
description: Author favourite place. A cliff-top valley in the subtropical south. In April you camp literally above the clouds.

name: Xızı Colourful Hills
highlight: Multicoloured clay hills on the way
description: Forest camping near the Caspian. The journey features stunning multicoloured hills.

name: Daşkəsən River Valley
description: Camping along mountain rivers in the lesser-visited Daşkəsən district.

name: Xaçmaz Forest and Sea
highlight: Beautiful forest near the Caspian Sea
description: Northern coast of Azerbaijan. Lovely forest but prepare for serious mosquitoes in summer.

name: Kəpəz Mountain
description: Camp at the base of Kəpəz mountain near Göygöl lake. Wake at 4am for the summit hike and watch the sunrise.
